questions.context_sentence: Have you seen Ben recently?
questions.cn: 你最近见过本吗？
questions.hint: recent(最近的) + ly(副词后缀) -> 最近地。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Have you seen Ben ________? (提示: 最近)

questions.context_sentence: Emily has earned a lot of money this year.
questions.cn: 埃米莉今年赚了很多钱。
questions.hint: ea(姨) + rn(融入) -> 姨融入了社会，开始赚钱了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Emily has ________ a lot of money this year. (提示: 赚得)

questions.context_sentence: There was a bus drivers' strike last week, so there were no buses.
questions.cn: 上周公交车司机罢工，所以没有公交车。
questions.hint: s(死) + trike(三轮车) -> 骑着三轮车去抗议罢工。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: There was a bus drivers' ________ last week, so there were no buses. (提示: 罢工)

questions.context_sentence: I got home late last night. I was very tired and went straight to bed.
questions.cn: 我昨晚很晚才到家。我很累，直接上床睡觉了。
questions.hint: str(死人) + aight(看作eight, 8) -> 8个人死死地笔直站着。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I got home late last night. I was very tired and went ________ to bed. (提示: 直接地)

questions.context_sentence: Now he works as a gardener.
questions.cn: 现在他做园丁工作。
questions.hint: garden(花园) + er(人) -> 在花园里工作的人就是园丁。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Now he works as a ________. (提示: 园丁)

questions.context_sentence: I wonder where he is.
questions.cn: 我想知道他在哪里。
questions.hint: won(赢) + der(得) -> 想知道怎样才能赢得比赛。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I ________ where he is. (提示: 想知道)

questions.context_sentence: Yes, but the movie was awful.
questions.cn: 是的，但那部电影太糟糕了。
questions.hint: aw(噢) + ful(充满的) -> 噢，充满了糟糕的事情。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Yes, but the movie was ________. (提示: 糟糕的)

questions.context_sentence: Did you eat a lot of sweets when you were a child?
questions.cn: 你小时候吃很多糖果吗？
questions.hint: sweet(甜的) + s(复数) -> 甜的东西就是糖果。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Did you eat a lot of ________ when you were a child? (提示: 糖果)

questions.context_sentence: When was this bridge built?
questions.cn: 这座桥是什么时候建的？
questions.hint: b(爸) + ridge(山脊) -> 爸爸在山脊上架起了一座桥。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: When was this ________ built? (提示: 桥)

questions.context_sentence: It's been a really good holiday.
questions.cn: 这真是一个非常棒的假期。
questions.hint: holi(神圣的) + day(日子) -> 神圣放假的日子就是假期。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: It's been a really good ________. (提示: 假期)

questions.context_sentence: Paul and Lucy arrived ten minutes ago.
questions.cn: 保罗和露西十分钟前到达了。
questions.hint: ar(阿) + rive(河) -> 阿到达了河边。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Paul and Lucy ________ ten minutes ago. (提示: 到达)

questions.context_sentence: My grandfather died before I was born.
questions.cn: 我祖父在我出生前就去世了。
questions.hint: di(大) + e(鹅) -> 大鹅死了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: My grandfather ________ before I was born. (提示: 死亡)

questions.context_sentence: I got home late last night. I was very tired and went straight to bed.
questions.cn: 我昨晚很晚才到家。我很累，直接上床睡觉了。
questions.hint: str(死人) + aight(看作eight, 8) -> 8个人死死地笔直站着。
questions.title: Vocab Master
